case_title: ROBERTO MACIAS SANCHEZ VS. BURL WALKER et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-16-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-01-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-01-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, ROBERTO MACIAS AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, BURL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-01-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-02-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-03-2002
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, ROBERTO MACIAS

NOTICE OF PENDENCY OF ACTION FILE BY PLTF'S ATTORNEY.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR OCT-01-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST ROBERT M. SELLARDS, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-01-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-16-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: DEBORAH LUBIN, CSR #3234. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
